generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.com/DTDFVocab"
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors wind speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurements from the encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]
instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements from the anemometer",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

    base:desc "Controls cart movement along gantry rail"
]
instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls hoisting operations"
]
instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles container pickup and release at hoist end"
]
instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Accurate system representation using CAD models from Fusion360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]
instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architecture visualization using context and container diagrams",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]
instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization for deployment of digital twin components",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]
instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboards for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]
instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for inter-service communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for control logic and data processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hardware interfacing for physical components",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]
instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for system representation",

]
instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture design tool",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]
instance KiCad : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Electronic circuit design for controller hardware",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]
instance MkDocs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Documentation generation for digital twin system",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]
instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control and collaboration for digital twin development",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizing crane operations through trajectory generation",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]
instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Recording operational metrics over time for analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]
instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

]

    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state parameters"
]

    base:desc "Continuous validation of physical-digital model alignment"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application, a Python program, executes movement trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service through the Physical Crane Interface to control the Physical Crane. Command formats, validation, authentication, and feedback mechanisms are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system uses the C4 Model for architectural visualization with context and container diagrams, implements containerization for deployment, and adopts an ad-hoc approach rather than a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculating distance metrics against an acceptable threshold. Functionality validation was confirmed through empirical testing of control algorithms and sensor accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter-service communication within the digital twin system uses an MQTT Broker for signaling. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on a personal computer (on-premise), with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers containerized using Docker. The Python-based C4 Containers (Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, Human Machine Interface) are bundled into a Python module named gantrylib."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML standard is used for the digital twin in the Air Quality Management exemplar. No other industry standards or interoperability specifications are explicitly mentioned."
]
